project.name: understand-anything
project.description: An open-source tool combining LLM intelligence with static analysis to produce interactive dashboards for understanding codebases.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Defines all core TypeScript interfaces and types for the knowledge graph system, including GraphNode, GraphEdge, KnowledgeGraph, Layer, TourStep, ProjectMeta, AnalysisMeta, and the AnalyzerPlugin interface contract.

nodes.name: schema.ts
nodes.summary: Provides Zod runtime schema validation for all KnowledgeGraph data structures, mirroring the TypeScript type definitions in types.ts and exposing a validateGraph function.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel entry point for the core package that re-exports all public APIs including types, persistence, schema validation, tree-sitter plugin, graph builder, LLM analyzer, search engines, staleness detection, layer detection, tour generation, language lessons, plugin registry, and plugin discovery.

nodes.name: search.ts
nodes.summary: Implements fuzzy search over graph nodes using Fuse.js with weighted fields, extended OR-query tokenization, and optional type filtering.

nodes.name: staleness.ts
nodes.summary: Detects whether the persisted knowledge graph is stale relative to the current git HEAD by diffing commit hashes, and provides incremental graph merging.

nodes.name: embedding-search.ts
nodes.summary: Implements vector-embedding-based semantic search over graph nodes using cosine similarity, with score inversion to match Fuse.js convention.

nodes.name: validateGraph
nodes.summary: Validates an unknown value against the KnowledgeGraphSchema using Zod's safeParse, returning a structured ValidationResult.

nodes.name: SearchEngine
nodes.summary: Wraps Fuse.js to provide fuzzy search over GraphNode arrays with weighted field scoring, OR-tokenized queries, type filtering, and live index rebuilding.

nodes.name: SemanticSearchEngine
nodes.summary: Vector search engine using pre-computed embeddings and cosine similarity with optional type and threshold filters.

nodes.name: cosineSimilarity
nodes.summary: Computes the cosine similarity between two numeric vectors in a single pass.

nodes.name: getChangedFiles
nodes.summary: Shells out to git diff to retrieve the list of files changed between a given commit hash and HEAD.

nodes.name: isStale
nodes.summary: Determines if the knowledge graph is stale by checking whether any files changed since the last analyzed commit hash.

nodes.name: mergeGraphUpdate
nodes.summary: Incrementally updates an existing KnowledgeGraph by removing nodes and edges associated with changed files and appending newly analyzed nodes.

nodes.name: graph-builder.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the GraphBuilder class that incrementally accumulates file, function, and class nodes plus edges before assembling a final KnowledgeGraph.

nodes.name: GraphBuilder
nodes.summary: Stateful builder that collects nodes and edges incrementally via addFile, addFileWithAnalysis, addImportEdge, addCallEdge, then emits a KnowledgeGraph via build().

nodes.name: detectLanguage
nodes.summary: Derives a language identifier string from a file path by matching its extension.

nodes.name: llm-analyzer.ts
nodes.summary: Provides prompt-builder functions and response-parser functions for LLM-based file analysis and project-level summary.

nodes.name: buildFileAnalysisPrompt
nodes.summary: Constructs an LLM prompt for analyzing a single source file.

nodes.name: buildProjectSummaryPrompt
nodes.summary: Constructs an LLM prompt for generating a project-level summary.

nodes.name: parseFileAnalysisResponse
nodes.summary: Parses an LLM JSON response for file analysis into a typed LLMFileAnalysis object.

nodes.name: parseProjectSummaryResponse
nodes.summary: Parses an LLM JSON response for project summary.

nodes.name: layer-detector.ts
nodes.summary: Implements heuristic and LLM-driven architectural layer detection.

nodes.name: detectLayers
nodes.summary: Heuristically assigns file nodes to named architectural layers by matching directory paths.

nodes.name: buildLayerDetectionPrompt
nodes.summary: Builds an LLM prompt for identifying architectural layers.

nodes.name: parseLayerDetectionResponse
nodes.summary: Parses and validates an LLM JSON response for layer detection.

nodes.name: applyLLMLayers
nodes.summary: Applies LLM-provided layer definitions to a KnowledgeGraph by prefix-matching file paths.

nodes.name: language-lesson.ts
nodes.summary: Detects language-specific programming concepts and generates LLM prompts for beginner-friendly language lessons.

nodes.name: detectLanguageConcepts
nodes.summary: Scans a graph node for keywords matching 12 pre-defined concept patterns.

nodes.name: buildLanguageLessonPrompt
nodes.summary: Constructs an LLM prompt for generating a language lesson for a graph node.

nodes.name: parseLanguageLessonResponse
nodes.summary: Parses an LLM JSON response for a language lesson.

nodes.name: tour-generator.ts
nodes.summary: Generates guided codebase tours via LLM prompts and heuristically using Kahn's topological sort algorithm.

nodes.name: buildTourGenerationPrompt
nodes.summary: Builds an LLM prompt for generating a guided tour with ordered steps.

nodes.name: parseTourGenerationResponse
nodes.summary: Parses an LLM JSON response for tour generation.

nodes.name: generateHeuristicTour
nodes.summary: Generates a guided tour using Kahn's topological sort on the graph, grouping by architectural layer.

nodes.name: tree-sitter-plugin.ts
nodes.summary: Implements the TreeSitterPlugin class, a full static-analysis plugin for TypeScript and JavaScript using web-tree-sitter WASM.

nodes.name: TreeSitterPlugin
nodes.summary: Core analyzer plugin implementing AnalyzerPlugin interface; initializes WASM grammars and exposes analyzeFile, resolveImports, and extractCallGraph.

nodes.name: languageKeyFromPath
nodes.summary: Maps a file path's extension to a tree-sitter language key string.

nodes.name: traverse
nodes.summary: Recursively traverses an AST node tree, invoking a visitor callback on every node.

nodes.name: getStringValue
nodes.summary: Extracts the unquoted string content from a tree-sitter string literal AST node.

nodes.name: extractParams
nodes.summary: Extracts parameter name strings from a formal_parameters AST node.

nodes.name: extractReturnType
nodes.summary: Extracts the return type annotation string from a function-like AST node.

nodes.name: extractImportSpecifiers
nodes.summary: Extracts import specifier names from an import_clause AST node.

nodes.name: registry.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the PluginRegistry class that maps language identifiers to registered AnalyzerPlugin instances.

nodes.name: PluginRegistry
nodes.summary: Registry managing AnalyzerPlugin instances, dispatching analysis calls by file extension or language.

nodes.name: discovery.ts
nodes.summary: Defines plugin configuration types and utility functions to parse and serialize plugin configuration JSON.

nodes.name: parsePluginConfig
nodes.summary: Parses a JSON string into a validated PluginConfig object with fallback.

nodes.name: serializePluginConfig
nodes.summary: Serializes a PluginConfig object to pretty-printed JSON.

nodes.name: persistence/index.ts
nodes.summary: Provides the persistence layer for saving and loading KnowledgeGraph and AnalysisMeta JSON files.

nodes.name: saveGraph
nodes.summary: Writes a KnowledgeGraph as JSON to .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json.

nodes.name: loadGraph
nodes.summary: Reads and parses knowledge-graph.json with optional Zod validation.

nodes.name: saveMeta
nodes.summary: Writes AnalysisMeta to .understand-anything/meta.json.

nodes.name: loadMeta
nodes.summary: Reads and parses meta.json, returning null if not found.

nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.summary: Root React component orchestrating the dashboard layout with persona-adaptive panel arrangements.

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: Main app component that fetches the knowledge graph on mount and renders a persona-adaptive multi-panel layout.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: Application entry point that mounts the React root into the DOM under StrictMode.

nodes.name: store.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store defining complete dashboard state including graph data, search, chat messages, node explanations, persona selection, and tour management.

nodes.name: buildSystemPrompt
nodes.summary: Constructs a multi-section system prompt for the Claude API with full graph context.

nodes.name: getSortedTour
nodes.summary: Returns tour steps sorted by order for sequential navigation.

nodes.name: useDashboardStore
nodes.summary: Zustand store hook exposing all dashboard state and actions: graph loading, node selection, search, chat, explanation, layer toggling, persona switching, and tour navigation.

nodes.name: layout.ts
nodes.summary: Utility applying Dagre hierarchical graph layout to React Flow nodes and edges.

nodes.name: applyDagreLayout
nodes.summary: Runs Dagre layout on React Flow nodes and edges, returning computed positions.

nodes.name: GraphView.tsx
nodes.summary: React Flow-based interactive graph visualization with Dagre layout, persona-based filtering, layer grouping, and tour highlighting.

nodes.name: GraphView
nodes.summary: Renders the React Flow canvas with knowledge graph data, handling persona filtering, Dagre layout, layer groups, and node selection.

nodes.name: ChatPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat interface panel managing API key input, message rendering with react-markdown, auto-scroll, and user input.

nodes.name: ChatPanel
nodes.summary: Chat panel component handling API key setup, markdown message display, loading state, and keyboard shortcuts.

nodes.name: CodeViewer.tsx
nodes.summary: Monaco Editor-based code viewer displaying metadata and placeholder source code for selected graph nodes.

nodes.name: getLanguage
nodes.summary: Maps a file path's extension to a Monaco Editor language identifier.

nodes.name: CodeViewer
nodes.summary: React component rendering a read-only Monaco Editor panel for the selected graph node.

nodes.name: CustomNode.tsx
nodes.summary: Custom React Flow node component with type-based colors, complexity badges, and highlight rings.

nodes.name: CustomNodeData
nodes.summary: TypeScript interface defining the data shape for a custom React Flow node.

nodes.name: CustomNode
nodes.summary: Custom React Flow node rendering type, complexity, name, summary, and dynamic highlight styles.

nodes.name: LayerLegend.tsx
nodes.summary: Layer color constants, color-getter utilities, and a LayerLegend UI component.

nodes.name: getLayerColor
nodes.summary: Returns the background RGBA color for a layer index.

nodes.name: getLayerBorderColor
nodes.summary: Returns the border RGBA color for a layer index.

nodes.name: LayerLegend
nodes.summary: Toggle button for layer grouping and inline legend of layer names with color indicators.

nodes.name: LearnPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Guided learning/tour panel managing three states (no tour, ready, active) with step navigation and markdown.

nodes.name: LearnPanel
nodes.summary: Guided tour UI with state-machine rendering for empty, idle, and active phases including progress bar.

nodes.name: NodeInfo.tsx
nodes.summary: Detail panel for selected graph node displaying type, complexity, summary, AI explain, tags, and connections.

nodes.name: NodeInfo
nodes.summary: Comprehensive node metadata panel with LLM explanation trigger, tags, and connections list.

nodes.name: PersonaSelector.tsx
nodes.summary: Compact toggle button group for switching between three dashboard personas.

nodes.name: PersonaSelector
nodes.summary: Segmented button group for persona selection with active highlighting.

nodes.name: SearchBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Search bar with fuzzy/semantic mode toggle, live dropdown results, and keyboard dismissal.

nodes.name: SearchBar
nodes.summary: Search input with mode toggle, live top-5 results dropdown, and escape/outside-click handling.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel entry point for the skill package, re-exporting all public functions and types.

nodes.name: context-builder.ts
nodes.summary: Builds ChatContext from a KnowledgeGraph by fuzzy-searching and expanding 1-hop via graph edges.

nodes.name: buildChatContext
nodes.summary: Searches the KnowledgeGraph for matching nodes, expands 1 hop, returns structured ChatContext.

nodes.name: formatContextForPrompt
nodes.summary: Converts ChatContext into markdown suitable for LLM prompt injection.

nodes.name: diff-analyzer.ts
nodes.summary: Maps git-changed files to graph nodes and identifies downstream ripple effects with risk assessment.

nodes.name: buildDiffContext
nodes.summary: Maps changed file paths to graph nodes and expands to find all impacted nodes, edges, and layers.

nodes.name: formatDiffAnalysis
nodes.summary: Renders DiffContext as structured markdown with risk assessment.

nodes.name: explain-builder.ts
nodes.summary: Builds ExplainContext for a file or function path with neighbors and layer info.

nodes.name: buildExplainContext
nodes.summary: Resolves a file/function string to a graph node with children and 1-hop neighbors.

nodes.name: formatExplainPrompt
nodes.summary: Converts ExplainContext into a structured LLM explanation prompt.

nodes.name: onboard-builder.ts
nodes.summary: Generates a standalone markdown onboarding guide from a KnowledgeGraph.

nodes.name: buildOnboardingGuide
nodes.summary: Renders a complete onboarding markdown document from a KnowledgeGraph.

nodes.name: understand-chat.ts
nodes.summary: Thin skill handler composing buildChatContext and formatContextForPrompt into buildChatPrompt.

nodes.name: buildChatPrompt
nodes.summary: Builds a complete LLM chat prompt by composing graph context with a system instruction.

layers.name: Types & Schema Layer
layers.description: Core TypeScript type definitions and runtime schema validation that form the shared data contract across all packages

layers.name: Analysis Engine Layer
layers.description: Static analysis, graph construction, LLM-driven enrichment, layer detection, tour generation, and language lesson extraction

layers.name: Plugin & Persistence Layer
layers.description: Extensible plugin system for language-specific static analysis, plugin registry and discovery, and knowledge graph persistence

layers.name: Search & Core Services Layer
layers.description: Cross-cutting core services including fuzzy search, semantic search, staleness detection, and barrel entry point

layers.name: Skill (CLI Command) Layer
layers.description: Claude Code skill handlers implementing the /understand-* commands

layers.name: State Management Layer
layers.description: Zustand store holding all dashboard application state plus the dagre layout utility

layers.name: UI & Presentation Layer
layers.description: React dashboard components and application entry points

tour.title: 1. Introduction
tour.description:
Welcome to **Understand Anything**, an open-source codebase analysis tool and interactive dashboard that maps software repositories into navigable knowledge graphs of files, functions, classes, and dependencies.

By bridging deterministic static analysis (using `web-tree-sitter` AST parsing) and semantic analysis (using LLM-driven summaries, layer detectors, and guided tours), it helps developers quickly onboard and comprehend large, unfamiliar codebases. The entry point of the interactive UI dashboard is [App.tsx](file:packages/dashboard/src/App.tsx), which coordinates all panels, graph layouts, and state management.

tour.title: 2. What is this project for?
tour.description:
This project is built for software engineers, tech leads, and product managers who need to explore and comprehend complex software architectures.

It acts as an interactive documentation and analysis suite to:
1. **Accelerate Developer Onboarding**: Allowing new hires to visually walk through files without reading code blind.
2. **Perform Impact Analysis**: Enabling developers to trace code ripple effects using git diff overlays.
3. **Keep Documentation Fresh**: Auto-generating READMEs and system flows from source files.

The [App.tsx](file:packages/dashboard/src/App.tsx) component bootstraps the layout and persona configurations to customize view detail levels based on who is reading.

tour.title: 3. Why is this project useful?
tour.description:
Understand Anything addresses the friction of codebase exploration by providing:
- **Interactive Visual Mapping**: Renders files as nodes in [GraphView.tsx](file:packages/dashboard/src/components/GraphView.tsx) using React Flow and Dagre layout calculations.
- **Topologically Sorted Tours**: Organizes learning walks using Kahn's algorithm via [tour-generator.ts](file:packages/core/src/analyzer/tour-generator.ts) to guide newcomers in dependency-respecting order.
- **Impact Visualizations**: Highlights system nodes impacted by git changes before commits.
- **Interactive Chat Contexts**: Empowers developers to ask questions and receive answers built on graph-expanded file contexts.

tour.title: 4. Problem Statement
tour.description:
As software repositories grow, they suffer from architectural opacity and documentation decay.

Traditional text editors do not show directory boundaries or dependencies clearly, making it easy to introduce circular imports or unintended ripple effects. New developers take days to understand where critical execution paths begin, and manually written documentation goes out of date with every commit.

Understand Anything solves this by combining parser intelligence with LLM context to construct a living, self-healing knowledge graph defined by the system's core interfaces in [types.ts](file:packages/core/src/types.ts).

tour.title: 5. Methodology & Execution Flow
tour.description:
The system operates in a structured pipeline to scan and build code maps:
1. **Project Scanning**: The parser scanner recursively discovers files and identifies languages.
2. **Deterministic AST Parsing**: The analyzer runs [tree-sitter-plugin.ts](file:packages/core/src/plugins/tree-sitter-plugin.ts) to extract class/function declarations and import statements.
3. **Semantic Augmentation**: The LLM engine ([llm-analyzer.ts](file:packages/core/src/analyzer/llm-analyzer.ts)) writes concise summaries and tags for each code node.
4. **Layer Mapping & Kahn Sorting**: The pipeline groups nodes into architectural layers and generates step-by-step guides using [graph-builder.ts](file:packages/core/src/analyzer/graph-builder.ts).
5. **State Initialization**: The dashboard loads the validated JSON into the Zustand store ([store.ts](file:packages/dashboard/src/store.ts)) to render the interactive UI.

tour.title: 6. Technology Stack
tour.description:
The codebase is structured as a pnpm monorepo containing:
- **Core Engine Dependencies**: Powered by **TypeScript**, **web-tree-sitter** WASM grammars, **zod** runtime schema validation ([schema.ts](file:packages/core/src/schema.ts)), and **fuse.js** for client-side fuzzy search.
- **Dashboard UI Stack**: Built on **React 19**, **Vite**, **Tailwind CSS v4**, **Zustand** for state, and **@xyflow/react** (React Flow) for graph visual rendering.
- **Layout and Graph Algorithms**: Incorporates **Dagre** for tree alignments, **Graphology** for network utilities, and **Louvain community detection** for clustering nodes in knowledge-base mode.

tour.title: 7. System Architecture
tour.description:
The codebase uses a clean separation of concerns across packages:
- **Root Project**: Contains environment configurations, ESLint settings, and multi-platform installation handlers (`install.sh`, `install.ps1`).
- **@understand-anything/core**: The analytical engine exposed by [index.ts](file:packages/core/src/index.ts). It encapsulates AST parsers, LLM analyzers, Staleness/Git detectors, and the persistence layer.
- **@understand-anything/dashboard**: The single-page React app (built on [App.tsx](file:packages/dashboard/src/App.tsx)) housing the graph visualization and UI workspace panels.
- **CLI Plugin Registry**: Symlinks commands (like `/understand`, `/understand-chat`) to IDE workflows (Cursor, VS Code, Claude Code).

tour.title: 8. Dependency Mapping
tour.description:
The project modules follow a strict hierarchical dependency graph:
- **UI Components** (like [LearnPanel.tsx](file:packages/dashboard/src/components/LearnPanel.tsx)) import the **Zustand store** ([store.ts](file:packages/dashboard/src/store.ts)) to select nodes and drive tour step changes.
- The **Zustand store** acts as a central coordinator, importing the browser scanner to trigger dynamic, client-side repository analysis.
- The browser scanner calls the **core package** types ([types.ts](file:packages/core/src/types.ts)) and schema validator ([schema.ts](file:packages/core/src/schema.ts)) to construct a valid graph payload.
- The **CLI plugin skills** import the **core library**'s APIs to run git-diff overlays, generate onboarding guides, and serialize the graph to disk using the persistence module.
